caption: A man, identified by on-screen text as Bola Tinubu, is featured in a series of static shots. He wears glasses, a grey garment, and a matching patterned traditional cap. He maintains a steady, neutral expression while looking toward the camera against a dark, blurred background. The frames are overlaid with a consistent graphical interface from a news program. A purple banner reads "PLUS POLITICS" above a larger white section with the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". In the upper left corner, a "plustv" logo is visible. The bottom of the screen displays viewing information, including the "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308" logos. Some frames also include a "FOLLOW US" section with social media icons and the handle "PLUSTVAFRICA". There is no visible movement or change in the man's pose or the background across the sequence.
